name: momentum_v22
_note: Approximation of the live v2.2 momentum/DVM swing model in the declarative schema. The original blends percentile-ranked factors (rel-strength 25%, abs-momentum 15%, vol-adj-momentum 15%, trend 10%, volume 10%, entry-timing 15%, quality 10%); here we approximate the momentum lean with a trend+momentum filter, ATR stops and a 2:1 target. Sector cap = 2 per the methodology.
